title: Assistant Store Manager - The Coffee Bean India South Asia Partners - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - The Coffee Bean India South Asia Partners - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Assistant Store Manager with drive and ambition, The Coffee Bean India South Asia Partners in Thane is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About The Coffee Bean India South Asia Partners:
The Coffee Bean India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with The Coffee Bean India South Asia Partners!
